title: To Sleep
content:
Come, Sleep! but mind ye! if you come without
The little girl that struck me at the rout,
By Jove! I would not give you half-a-crown
For all your poppy-heads and all your down.
meaning: About: Walter Savage Landor (January 30, 1775 � September 17, 1864) was an English writer and poet, eldest son of Walter Landor and his wife Elizabeth Savage.
